headline: PPL Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: PPL (NYSE:PPL) reported higher first-quarter earnings and reaffirmed its 2026 and long-term financial targets, while executives highlighted regulatory developments, data center-driven load growth and potential generation investments across the company’s service territories. President and CEO Vince
